documentation.description: Because of this derivation, the code may not adhere to the PragmAda Coding Standard

simple_types.name: Method_Type
simple_types.code:
type Method_Type is (
                     LZHuf,
                     IZ_4,
                     IZ_5,
                     IZ_6,
                     IZ_7,
                     IZ_8,
                     IZ_9,
                     IZ_10,
,
,
                     …,
                     Read_LZ77_Codes
                    );

enumeration_literals.name: LZHuf
enumeration_literals.description: Use the Info-Zip algorithm, levels 4-10 (see body for details and credits)

enumeration_literals.name: IZ_10
enumeration_literals.description: Use LZMA SDK's BT4 algorithm (see body for details and credits)

enumeration_literals.name: BT4
enumeration_literals.description: A nice simple LZ77 compressor by Rich Geldreich, Jr.

enumeration_literals.name: Rich
enumeration_literals.description:
Just send literals (plain bytes), no LZ77 compression at all.
It is better with LZMA on some rare image formats for instance.

enumeration_literals.name: No_LZ77
enumeration_literals.description: Read LZ77 codes from a text files (for research purposes)

array_types.name: Byte_Array
array_types.code: type Byte_Array is array (Natural range <>) of Byte;

array_types.name: DLP_Array
array_types.code: type DLP_Array is array (Positive range <>) of Distance_Length_Pair;

array_types.name: Matches_Array
array_types.code: type Matches_Array is array (Prefetch_Index_Type range <>) of Matches_Type;

record_types.name: Distance_Length_Pair
Matches_Type

subtypes.name: Prefetch_Index_Type
subtypes.code: subtype Prefetch_Index_Type is Natural range 0 .. BT4_Max_Prefetch_Positions;

subprograms.name: Encode
